home.subtitle: Developer and digital creator
home.description: I build modern, accessible web experiences with a focus on clean code and thoughtful design. Passionate about open source and continuous learning.
home.extra: Currently exploring the intersection of design systems and developer experience — always open to new challenges and collaborations.

about.title: About me
about.intro: I'm a software developer with a passion for building things that live on the internet. I care deeply about user experience, performance, and maintainability.
about.bio_1: With a background in both frontend and backend development, I enjoy working across the full stack — from crafting pixel-perfect interfaces to designing robust APIs. I believe great software is built collaboratively, with empathy for both the people who use it and the people who maintain it.
about.bio_2: When I'm not coding, you'll find me reading about design, contributing to open source projects, or experimenting with new technologies to stay sharp and curious.
about.skills_desc: My toolkit includes TypeScript, React, Node.js, Astro, and PostgreSQL — along with a deep appreciation for accessibility, testing, and clean architecture.
about.description: Software developer passionate about clean code, accessibility and great user experiences.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Some of the work I've developed throughout my journey
projects.description: A selection of personal and professional projects built with modern web technologies.
projects.content_placeholder_1: This project was built to solve a real-world problem with a focus on clean architecture and developer experience. The stack was chosen to maximize performance while keeping the codebase maintainable.
projects.content_placeholder_2: The implementation follows best practices for accessibility, testing, and progressive enhancement. Every decision was made with the end user in mind.
projects.content_placeholder_3: Feel free to explore the source code and reach out if you have any questions or suggestions.
